Inpinity Advertising

Curated Visibility for the Ecosystem

Advertising on Inpinity is being rebuilt in a cleaner and more useful way. The goal is not spam or clutter, but curated placement that fits the Inpinity ecosystem, community trust, and future gameplay structure.

⚠️ Important Update: We withdrew from ToshiMart due to phishing concerns. Only use the official INPI token: 0x232FB12582ac10d5fAd97e9ECa22670e8Ba67d0D. All official contracts are listed on our homepage.

🔥 PRESALE LIVE NOW: 2,000,000 INPI per 1 ETH until March 25, 2026. 👉 Join the Presale

UNDER CONSTRUCTION EARLY PARTNERS CURATED ONLY

📢 Advertising

We are preparing a clean, non-intrusive format for partner visibility across the Inpinity ecosystem — aligned with design, trust, and long-term utility.

What “Advertising” will mean in Inpinity

  • Curated partner visibility across pages like Mint, Map, Game and ecosystem hubs.
  • Collaboration-first placement where projects can connect with partnerships, resources and future gameplay.
  • Verified-only exposure with focus on safety, authenticity and long-term relevance.

Planned direction

Instead of noisy banners, Inpinity aims for ecosystem-native presentation: selected partnerships, curated project highlights, and integrations that feel useful inside the Pi-Phi Pyramid universe.

Until the full system is live, please use the Collaboration page and the Features page for early partnership direction.

🤝 Become a Partner ✨ Partnership Vision
Advertising / Partnership contact:
Email: xpective@inpinity.online
Discord: Join our Discord
